```{r}

######################################
## Multivariate clustering using UPGMA
######################################

pheno <- read.table("/homes/addyhope/research/GWAS_standardized data/Pheno_GWAS.txt", head=T)

trait_mat <- pheno[, -c(1, 38:47)]  # remove Taxa column

cor_mat <- cor(trait_mat, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")

dist_cor <- as.dist(1 - cor_mat)

hc_traits <- hclust(dist_cor, method = "average")  # average is UPGMA
groups_k4 <- cutree(hc_traits, k = 4)  # adjust k as needed

OUT_DIR <- "/homes/addyhope/research"
if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
options(bitmapType = "cairo")

# Save dendrogram

pdf(file.path(OUT_DIR, "traits_dendrogram_avg_corrdist.pdf"),
    width = 10, height = 7.5, useDingbats = FALSE)
plot(hc_traits,
     main = "Hierarchical trait clustering (UPGMA)",
     xlab = "", ylab = "Correlation distance", sub = "", cex = 0.7)
dev.off()

# Save clustered heatmap
rowv <- as.dendrogram(hc_traits)
colv <- as.dendrogram(hc_traits)

pal <- colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(50)

pdf(file.path(OUT_DIR, "traits_cor_heatmap_avg_corrdist.pdf"),
    width = 11, height = 9, useDingbats = FALSE)
heatmap(cor_mat,
        Rowv = rowv, Colv = colv, symm = TRUE,
        scale = "none", col = pal, margins = c(8, 8),
        xlab = "Traits", ylab = "Traits",
        main = "Trait correlations (clustered by correlation distance)")
dev.off()

# Save numeric outputs
write.csv(cor_mat,
          file.path(OUT_DIR, "trait_correlations.csv"),
          row.names = TRUE)

write.csv(as.matrix(dist_cor),
          file.path(OUT_DIR, "trait_correlation_distance.csv"),
          row.names = TRUE)

cl_df <- data.frame(Trait = names(groups_k4), Cluster_k4 = groups_k4,
                    row.names = NULL, check.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cl_df,
          file.path(OUT_DIR, "trait_clusters_k4.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```
